column1: Peter the Great _____ his childhood in Moscow. (spend)
The children always _____ uniforms when they are at school. (wear)
My grandmother _____ a uniform when she _____ a schoolgirl. (wear, be)
A lot of visitors _____ alligators at the zoo. There are always a lot of people in the reptile house. (watch)
Where are the boys? - There they are. They _____ the alligators. (watch)
The Ancient Greeks _____ good laws and strong armies. (have)
I can't _____ my sister. - I _____ to help you. What _____ she _____? (find, try, wear)
Let's put the boots into the box, I _____ them next winter. (wear)
She likes jeans, but today she _____ a dress. (wear)
